news_items.headline: Claude's Latest Update Just Made Agent Development Accessible
news_items.summary:
[Prompt Engineering · 9K views] Anthropic's new advisor strategy lets you pair Opus with Sonnet for better results at lower cost, the monitor tool kills wasteful polling loops in Claude Code, and managed agents handle the infrastructure grunt work for you. I walk through how each one works and when you should actually use them.
